cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. Let's start by gathering all the information provided. First, Steven woke up at 7am. That's the starting point. Then, we have different people who saw him at various places and times. Let me list them out: 1. Ashley saw Steven stretching at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So Steven was at the yoga studio during that time. So he couldn't have gone to the gas station during 7am to 10am because he was at yoga. So that time is out. 2. William saw Steven reading at the library from 1pm to 2pm. So that's another time block where he's occupied. So 1pm to 2pm is taken up by the library. 3. Jennifer saw Steven working at the office from 2pm to 3pm. So office time from 2 to 3 pm. So overlapping with the library time? Wait, William's observation was 1pm to 2pm, and Jennifer's is 2pm to 3pm. So Steven was at the library from 1-2pm, then at the office from 2-3pm. So no overlap there. So between 1pm and 3pm, he's at the library and office. 4. Michael saw Steven watching a movie at the theater from 3pm to 7pm. So from 3pm to 7pm, Steven is at the movie theater. That's a four-hour block. So he can't go to the gas station during that time either. 5. Mary saw Steven waiting at the train station from 7pm to 10pm. So Steven was at the train station during that time. The gas station is closed after 10pm. So he can't go after 10pm. So let's map out Steven's schedule: - 7am to 10am: Yoga studio - 10am to 1pm: ?? - 1pm to 2pm: Library - 2pm to 3pm: Office - 3pm to 7pm: Movie theater - 7pm to 10pm: Train station So the only time block that's unaccounted for is from 10am to 1pm. That's when Steven isn't reported to be anywhere. So during that time, he could have gone to the gas station. Also, the gas station is open until 10pm, so even if he went later, but he was at the train station from 7pm to 10pm, and after that the gas station is closed. So the only free time is 10am to 1pm.
